scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Go\bin\go.exe') { & 'C:\Program Files\Go\bin\go.exe' run ./cmd } else { go run ./cmd }"
scripts.start: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Go\bin\go.exe') { & 'C:\Program Files\Go\bin\go.exe' run ./cmd } else { go run ./cmd }"
